title: Creating porject in filtered Tables/Dashboard

posts.author: Falko (Falko Ritter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,
i have a Dashboard with already preselected data for working with my team.
Problem is, whenever i try to add a new project i can only type in the name and as soon as i hit enter the project disappears because it doesn’t fit the requirement for this board.
So i have to dump the filter, find the item, adjust the needed feature and reapply the filter which is annoying.
How can i enter all the data needed for this project before hitting enter?
Greetings.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Falko! At this time this is expected behaviour, as by design the characteristics of the newly created items do not match the filter settings, so therefore they’re not included in filtered view. I’d instead recommend adding the items via the main table and customising them from there - this way they remain visible regardless of whether they match the filter settings. Let me know if this makes sense!
